title: UMI Process Object
description: Universal Machine Interface schema for running process information.

ProcessName.description: Name of the executable without path or extension.

ParentProcessId.description: PID of the parent process, or null if root/unknown.

CpuPercent.description: Current CPU usage as a percentage of one core. May exceed 100 on multi-core if implementation reports aggregate.

MemoryPercent.description: Memory usage as percentage of total system RAM.

StartTime.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the process started.

CommandLine.description: Full command line that launched the process, if available.

ThreadCount.description: Number of threads owned by this process.
